name: Crockpot Macaroni and Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef, drain excess fat.
2. Place the beef in the crockpot.
3. Cook the macaroni according to package directions until just tender, then drain well. Cooking for slightly less than half the time specified on the package works well.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (tomato soup, chopped onion, salt, pepper, and mushroom pieces) to the crockpot with the beef.
5. Cook on low heat for 7 to 9 hours or on high heat for 3 to 4 hours until everything is heated through and flavors are well combined.
